---
name: Wrong genre classification
about: A game has incorrect or missing tags after running Enrich Genres
labels: classification
---

**Game name**
The exact title as it appears in the app.

**Current tags**
What tags the app assigned.

**What the tags should be**
What genres, themes, features, or mood tags you would expect.

**Why**
A brief note on what makes the current classification wrong (helps with improving the model prompt).
